finding_text: Procedures designed to prevent microbiological contamination of drug products purporting to be sterile did not include adequate validation of the aseptic and sterilization processes.
note: aseptic 바레 키워드 직접 매칭 -- sterile 패턴 변경과 무관하게 안정적으로 유지되는지 확인.

finding_text: Laboratory controls do not include the establishment of scientifically sound and appropriate specifications and test procedures designed to assure that in-process materials and drug products conform to appropriate standards of identity, strength, quality and purity.
The responsibilities and procedures applicable to the quality control unit are not in writing and fully followed.
note: 'quality control unit' 정형 문구(0a1df74a 의 OCR 정상 버전) -- OCR 정상일 때 정확히 분류되는지 확인하는 대조군.

finding_text: Written records of investigations into the failure of a batch or any of its components to meet specifications do not always include the conclusions and follow-up.
note: 'investigation' 키워드 -- 신규 batch...records 패턴이 'records of investigations... batch'(역순)에서 오발동하지 않는지 확인.

finding_text: A drug is misbranded under section 502(f)(1) of the FD&C Act if its labeling fails to bear adequate directions for use. "Adequate directions for use" means directions under which a layperson can use a drug safely and for the purposes for which it is intended (see 21 CFR 201.5). Prescription drugs, as defined in section 503(b)(1) of the FD&C Act include those that, because of their toxicity or other potentiality for harmful effect, or the method of their use, or the…
The written stability testing program is not followed.
note: stability 바레 키워드 직접 매칭 -- written procedure 제거와 무관.

finding_text: The Quality Unit has not established adequate procedural controls and oversight to ensure the accuracy of environmental monitoring data.
note: 'environmental monitoring' 인접 키워드 -- 'quality unit' 문구가 같은 문장에 있어도 environmental_monitoring 이 taxonomy 순서상 더 앞이라 먼저 매칭되는지 확인.

finding_text: Appropriate procedures are not established and followed for control ofcomputerized systems and electronic records in the QC laboratory.
note: 'electronic records' 매칭 -- 'computerized systems' 문구도 있지만 data_integrity 가 computer_system_validation 보다 여전히 앞이라 순서가 안전한지 확인(CSV 재배치가 data_integrity 를 앞지르지 않는지).

finding_text: Cleaning procedures are not appropriate or reproducible to prevent contamination that would alter the safety, identity, strength, quality, or purity of the finished drug substances.
note: 신규 'cleaning procedure' 키워드가 실제 correct 사례에서 여전히 작동하는지 확인.

finding_text: Equipment used in the manufacture, processing, packing, or holding of drug products is not of appropriate design to facilitate operations for its intended use.
note: 'equipment' 바레 키워드 -- facility 패턴의 outsourcing 부정 lookbehind 변경과 무관하게 안정적으로 유지되는지 확인.
